overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek traversing a desert canyon at night. The character moves steadily from open sandy terrain into a rocky mountain pass illuminated by bright moonlight, with large rock formations and sparse vegetation visible throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert plain with distant mountain

agents.ego_description: Bayek jogging steadily across open desert sands toward a large rock formation on the horizon

entered.detail: massive layered rock mountain dominating the horizon ahead
rippled sand dunes with visible tire tracks and footprints
scattered low shrubs and dry vegetation on the desert floor
dark blue night sky filled with visible stars

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert expanse at night, with the character moving steadily toward a massive rock formation in the distance. The ground is sandy with visible tracks, and sparse bushes dot the landscape under a star-filled sky.

events.description: bright full moon rises into view on the right horizon, casting strong illumination across the landscape

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the terrain transitions from soft sand to rocky gravel and stone

entered.detail: large bright full moon low on the horizon casting white light
scattered rocks and gravel replacing the smooth sand

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the moon becomes visible on the right, dramatically changing the lighting. The terrain shifts from sand to rocky gravel, and the distant mountain grows larger as the approach continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon pass with steep walls

events.description: entering the narrow canyon passage with rock walls rising on both sides

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow rocky canyon path with moonlight streaming from the right side

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face rising immediately to the left of the path
tall rock formation and sloping hillside on the right side

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions into a narrow canyon with steep rock walls on both sides. The path becomes more enclosed and rocky, while the bright moon continues to illuminate the scene from the right, casting long shadows across the canyon floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a wide desert expanse that gradually narrows into a moonlit rocky canyon. It begins on an open sandy plain under a star-filled sky, moving steadily toward a massive rock formation in the distance. As the character progresses, the moon emerges on the right to dramatically shift the lighting while the terrain transitions from soft sand to rocky gravel. The scene then closes in as the path enters a narrow canyon with steep rock walls on both sides, finally casting long shadows across the enclosed floor under the bright lunar glow.
